name: flesh_raptor.live_blocked_corridor_skirmisher_mcw
description: Live blocked/corridor raptor row: lateral orbit tiles are sealed by impassable racks while a straight east lane remains open, so the staged flesh raptor records graceful fallback/counterplay rather than jittery orbit selection.

steps.label: post_load_raptor_blocked_corridor_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: staged flesh-raptor blocked-corridor fixture loads to live map

steps.label: audit_saved_noon_before_raptor_blocked_corridor
steps.abort_reason: installed save did not prove expected noon turn before live flesh-raptor blocked-corridor window
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved turn proves local noon before blocked-corridor raptor window

steps.label: audit_saved_blocked_corridor_racks_before_raptor
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved map samples show lateral and behind orbit tiles blocked by racks before the raptor turn window
steps.abort_reason: saved map did not prove impassable lateral/behind orbit blockers before live blocked-corridor row

steps.label: audit_saved_blocked_corridor_east_lane_open_before_raptor
steps.abort_reason: saved map did not prove the east approach/retreat lane was open before live blocked-corridor row
steps.expected_visible_fact: saved map samples prove the straight east approach lane remains free of rack blockers

steps.label: audit_saved_flesh_raptor_before_blocked_corridor
steps.abort_reason: saved active_monsters metadata did not contain required blocked-corridor raptor footing
steps.expected_visible_fact: one hostile flesh raptor starts five tiles east down the only open lane

steps.label: toggle_safe_mode_off_before_raptor_blocked_corridor
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode is toggled off so the bounded live raptor blocked-corridor window is not consumed by warnings

steps.label: advance_raptor_blocked_corridor_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded live turn window records blocked-corridor fallback planning and concrete raptor melee outcomes instead of orbit jitter

steps.label: audit_flesh_raptor_blocked_corridor_live_plan
steps.abort_reason: same-run artifact lacked blocked-corridor fallback or raptor melee-event lines
steps.expected_visible_fact: same-run debug artifact proves blocked/corridor footing falls back gracefully through the live monster::plan seam and still records combat/frustration metrics

evidence_contract.claim: a staged live flesh raptor with lateral orbit tiles blocked by impassable racks does not jitter or force open-field circling; the live monster::plan seam emits fallback/no-readable-lateral-orbit and the encounter continues through ordinary corridor pressure with concrete combat-result metrics
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for flesh-raptor blocked-corridor fallback behavior
evidence_contract.writeback_note: No save/writeback gate: this scenario proves bounded live-plan/combat behavior from current-run logs plus saved start-state map/monster footing. Equipment-damage frustration remains observational only through melee_event outcomes and any player-facing equipment messages; no equipment damage tuning is changed here.
